# chronosphere_log_allocation_config (Resource)

Singleton config that allocates a portion of the org's log ingest quota to each dataset by priority, controlling which logs are kept when the quota is exceeded.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "chronosphere_log_allocation_config" "config" {
  default_dataset {
    allocation {
      percent_of_license = 100
    }

    priorities {
      high_priority_filter {
        query = "severity = 'error'"
      }
      low_priority_filter {
        query = "severity = 'debug'"
      }
    }
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `default_dataset` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Allocation and priority configuration for the default dataset, which receives any logs not matched by a `dataset_allocation` entry. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_dataset))

### Optional

- `dataset_allocation` (Block List, Max: 10) Per-dataset allocation and priority overrides. Datasets are evaluated in order; the first match wins. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--dataset_allocation))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--default_dataset"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_dataset`

Required:

- `allocation` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Resource allocation for the dataset, expressed as a share of the overall log license. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_dataset--allocation))

Optional:

- `priorities` (Block List, Max: 1) Defines high and low priority match criteria. Low priority logs are dropped first when the allocation is exhausted, then default priority, with high priority dropped last. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_dataset--priorities))

<a id="nestedblock--default_dataset--allocation"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_dataset.allocation`

Required:

- `percent_of_license` (Number) Percentage of the tenant's log license to allocate to this dataset, expressed as a number between 0 and 100.


<a id="nestedblock--default_dataset--priorities"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_dataset.priorities`

Optional:

- `high_priority_filter` (Block List) List of log search filters. Filters are combined as OR statements so only one filter needs to match. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_dataset--priorities--high_priority_filter))
- `low_priority_filter` (Block List) List of log search filters. Filters are combined as OR statements so only one filter needs to match. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_dataset--priorities--low_priority_filter))

<a id="nestedblock--default_dataset--priorities--high_priority_filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_dataset.priorities.high_priority_filter`

Required:

- `query` (String) Log search query that selects matching logs. Supports only top-level operations; nested clauses are not allowed and only one type of `AND` or `OR` operator can be used.


<a id="nestedblock--default_dataset--priorities--low_priority_filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_dataset.priorities.low_priority_filter`

Required:

- `query` (String) Log search query that selects matching logs. Supports only top-level operations; nested clauses are not allowed and only one type of `AND` or `OR` operator can be used.




<a id="nestedblock--dataset_allocation"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dataset_allocation`

Required:

- `allocation` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Resource allocation for the dataset, expressed as a share of the overall log license. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--dataset_allocation--allocation))
- `dataset_id` (String) Slug of the dataset this allocation applies to.

Optional:

- `priorities` (Block List, Max: 1) Defines high and low priority match criteria. Low priority logs are dropped first when the allocation is exhausted, then default priority, with high priority dropped last. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--dataset_allocation--priorities))

<a id="nestedblock--dataset_allocation--allocation"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dataset_allocation.allocation`

Required:

- `percent_of_license` (Number) Percentage of the tenant's log license to allocate to this dataset, expressed as a number between 0 and 100.


<a id="nestedblock--dataset_allocation--priorities"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dataset_allocation.priorities`

Optional:

- `high_priority_filter` (Block List) List of log search filters. Filters are combined as OR statements so only one filter needs to match. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--dataset_allocation--priorities--high_priority_filter))
- `low_priority_filter` (Block List) List of log search filters. Filters are combined as OR statements so only one filter needs to match. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--dataset_allocation--priorities--low_priority_filter))

<a id="nestedblock--dataset_allocation--priorities--high_priority_filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dataset_allocation.priorities.high_priority_filter`

Required:

- `query` (String) Log search query that selects matching logs. Supports only top-level operations; nested clauses are not allowed and only one type of `AND` or `OR` operator can be used.


<a id="nestedblock--dataset_allocation--priorities--low_priority_filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dataset_allocation.priorities.low_priority_filter`

Required:

- `query` (String) Log search query that selects matching logs. Supports only top-level operations; nested clauses are not allowed and only one type of `AND` or `OR` operator can be used.
